title: Stam Reath
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|[[Echuu Shen-Jon]]'s [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]|[[Reath Silas]], a [[Padawan]] of [[Jora Malli]]|linebreak=1}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Stam.jpg]] |name=Stam Reath |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blonde]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Fair |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters=[[Echuu Shen-Jon]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Why wait?|Stam Reath|audio=Stam.flac|}} '''Stam Reath''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in the decade leading to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Master, I tried... I am sorry that I have failed you...''"
"''Stam, no... It is ''I'' who have failed ''you''.|A dying Reath and his Master, Echuu Shen-Jon|}} A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Stam Reath and his sister, [[Naat Reath|Naat]], were given to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by their parents. Studying together at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] which would plague the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] for nearly a decade, Reath was selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] while his sister remained at the Temple. Selected as part of [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] [[Jedi assault team/Legends|task force]] that was sent to rescue [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] from [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], Reath and Shen-Jon rushed to the planet to [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|fight]] during the opening salvo of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[File:Stam_Death.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Echuu Shen-Jon]] looking upon the body of his Padawan, Stam Reath]] At some point after [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] arrived with Clone reinforcements to evacuate the Jedi task force from the [[Petranaki arena]], Reath and his master joined [[Jedi High Council/Legends|High Council]] members [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] and [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], along with several other Jedi in a mission to destroy several [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Core ship/Legends|battleship cores]]. Completing the mission successfully, the group was then ordered to prevent [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] from escaping to a hangar and leaving the planet. When the Jedi reached the area, they encountered [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolyte]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]], a prominent [[General/Legends|General]] for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Reath declared Dooku's arrest and attempted to stop him. Tann quickly engaged Reath in a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]], resulting in Reath being quickly cut down, with Tann mocking his abilities as she and Dooku made their escape. Reath's last words were directed at his master, conveying his belief that he had failed his master. But Shen-Jon assured him that it was he who had failed Reath. Reath's death left both his sister and Shen-Jon in great emotional pain and suffering from the temptation of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. ==Behind the scenes== Stam Reath was voiced by actor [[Jess Harnell]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{Blog|holocron|10|Jedi Casualties: Battle of Geonosis}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Stam Reath|soundcat=Audio files of Stam Reath}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Stam Reath |es=Stam Reath |pl=Stam Reath |pt=Stam Reath }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Reath, Stam}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi assault team members]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi]]
